summary: Completed comprehensive testing of R2A Industrie accounting module. All backend APIs working correctly with 100% test success rate. Frontend accounting page fully functional with 4 tabs, dashboard stats, and CRUD operations for revenues, expenses, and invoices.

ui_bugs.issue: Invoice dropdown menu for status updates (mark as paid) not easily accessible - dropdown trigger button hard to locate

issues: Console warnings about missing DialogContent descriptions for form dialogs

passed_tests: Accounting dashboard with revenue/expense/profit stats and monthly chart
Revenue CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Expense CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Auto-revenue creation when invoice marked as paid
Role restriction - 403 for non-admin users on accounting endpoints
Frontend accounting page with 4 tabs (Dashboard, Revenus, Dépenses, Factures)
Dashboard showing 5 stat cards and monthly bar chart
Category filtering for revenues and expenses
